title: Tasks to be completed for a Beta Release
author: joubertdj
body_snippet:
Dear mRemoteNG Community / Kvarkas,

Looking at the issues and the commits that have been occuring recently I am optimistic about the future of mRemoteNG.
However, one thing I think the mRemoteNG community needs is a kind of "ToDo" list that we need to be able to tackle so that we can get to a semi-Beta state release.

@Kvarkas : With a better plan and/or "ToDo" list the community can support you better. I am sure we could rally around such a "ToDo". Hell, most of us have AI agents anyway, so we...

iterations.description: Issue body is empty and carries legacy 1.78.* labels; the mentioned tasks (sensitive data separation, local DB encryption) need scoping and verification against the current fork build before actionable implementation can begin.
Repass confirmed: Meta project management issue, not a bug or feature request

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: Hello, thanks :) yes with AI help I managing make this wheels to move, at this moment a bit in hurry to prepare RC version and its 2 main stuff left to finish - separate sensitive information from settings, and settings it self (as connection data) move inside a local db for better protection (encryption by default) so mR dosnt store sensitive data in connection profile but just an id and source name from where to fetch once connection is requested. What minimise a time that password will be exp...

notes: Meta issue: tasks for beta release. Not a bug, project management artifact.
